ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
python_min:
- '3.10'

about.summary: Signatures for entire Python programs. Extract the structure, the frame, the skeleton of your project, to generate API documentation or find breaking changes in your API.

build.script: UV_DYNAMIC_VERSIONING_BYPASS=${{ version }} python -m pip install packages/griffelib -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation

about.summary: Signatures for entire Python programs. Extract the structure, the frame, the skeleton of your project, to generate API documentation or find breaking changes in your API.

build.script: UV_DYNAMIC_VERSIONING_BYPASS=${{ version }} python -m pip install packages/griffelib -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation

name: griffelib
raw_meta_yaml:
context:
  version: "2.0.2"

recipe:
  name: griffe
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/mkdocstrings/griffe/archive/refs/tags/${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 07d91aef444557d62c96b6f4f1c886a037499bdb71c9d41fcb78e8606f974870
  # We need to patch griffe's version discovery script until they remove the PDM backend
  # https://github.com/mkdocstrings/griffe/blob/2666aaabe9b93f70c3dcde46ac284251a065a5c1/pyproject.toml#L2-L4
  patches:
    - patches/0001-respect-UV_DYNAMIC_VERSIONING_BYPASS-in-get_version.patch

build:
  number: 0

outputs:
  - package:
      name: griffelib
      version: ${{ version }}
    build:
      number: 0
      noarch: python
      script: UV_DYNAMIC_VERSIONING_BYPASS=${{ version }} python -m pip install packages/griffelib -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
        - pip
        - hatchling
        - pdm-backend
        - uv-dynamic-versioning >=0.7.0
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
    tests:
      - python:
          imports:
            - griffe
          pip_check: true
          python_version: ${{ python_min }}.*
    about:
      homepage: https://mkdocstrings.github.io/griffe
      documentation: https://mkdocstrings.github.io/griffe
      repository: https://github.com/mkdocstrings/griffe
      summary: >-
        Signatures for entire Python programs. Extract the structure, the frame,
        the skeleton of your project, to generate API documentation or find
        breaking changes in your API.
      license: ISC
      license_file: LICENSE

  - package:
      name: griffecli
      version: ${{ version }}
    build:
      number: 0
      noarch: python
      python:
        entry_points:
          - griffecli = griffecli:main
      script: UV_DYNAMIC_VERSIONING_BYPASS=${{ version }} python -m pip install packages/griffecli -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
        - pip
        - hatchling
        - pdm-backend
        - uv-dynamic-versioning >=0.7.0
        - ${{ pin_subpackage("griffelib", upper_bound="x.x.x") }}
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - colorama >=0.4
        - ${{ pin_subpackage("griffelib", upper_bound="x.x.x") }}
    tests:
      - script:
          - griffecli --help
          - griffecli --version
      - python:
          imports:
            - griffecli
          pip_check: true
          python_version: ${{ python_min }}.*
    about:
      homepage: https://mkdocstrings.github.io/griffe
      documentation: https://mkdocstrings.github.io/griffe
      repository: https://github.com/mkdocstrings/griffe
      summary: CLI tools for griffe - signatures for entire Python programs.
      license: ISC
      license_file: LICENSE

  - package:
      name: griffe
      version: ${{ version }}
    build:
      number: 0
      noarch: python
      python:
        entry_points:
          - griffe = griffecli:main
      script: UV_DYNAMIC_VERSIONING_BYPASS=${{ version }} python -m pip install . -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
        - pip
        - hatchling
        - pdm-backend
        - uv-dynamic-versioning >=0.7.0
        - ${{ pin_subpackage("griffelib", upper_bound="x.x.x") }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage("griffecli", upper_bound="x.x.x") }}
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage("griffelib", upper_bound="x.x.x") }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage("griffecli", upper_bound="x.x.x") }}
    tests:
      - python:
          imports:
            - griffe
          pip_check: true
          python_version: ${{ python_min }}.*
      - script:
          - griffe --help
          - griffe --version
    about:
      homepage: https://mkdocstrings.github.io/griffe
      documentation: https://mkdocstrings.github.io/griffe
      repository: https://github.com/mkdocstrings/griffe
      summary: >-
        Signatures for entire Python programs. Extract the structure, the frame,
        the skeleton of your project, to generate API documentation or find
        breaking changes in your API.
      license: ISC
      license_file: LICENSE

about:
  homepage: https://mkdocstrings.github.io/griffe
  documentation: https://mkdocstrings.github.io/griffe
  repository: https://github.com/mkdocstrings/griffe
  summary: >-
    Signatures for entire Python programs. Extract the structure, the frame,
    the skeleton of your project, to generate API documentation or find
    breaking changes in your API.
  license: ISC
  license_file: LICENSE

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - bandersen23
    - dbast
    - moritzwilksch
